name: wechat-article-polisher
description: Extract WeChat articles, download images, upload them to a custom image host, and polish the article with an OpenAI-compatible model.

scripts.check: node --check ./lib/extract-core.js && node --check ./lib/article-format.js && node --check ./lib/image-host.js && node --check ./lib/llm.js && node --check ./lib/pipeline.js && node --check ./scripts/process-wechat.js
